founder.name: Sofia Marchetti
founder.bio: Robotics researcher. Building warehouse pick-and-place automation.

company.name: Runway Robotics
company.one_liner: Vision-language policies for warehouse pick-and-place arms.

content.text: Thrilled to announce Runway Robotics has raised a $2M seed round to automate the warehouse!
content.author: sofiam_robotics

content.note: Funding check: no seed round found in any registry or press. Cap table review shows angel checks totaling ~$180k. The '$2M seed' announcement is unsupported.
